## What this changes and why


## Checklist
- [ ] `python manage.py test` passes
- [ ] `python manage.py makemigrations --check` is clean (or a migration is included)
- [ ] Tailwind rebuilt if templates changed (`node_modules/.bin/tailwindcss -i static/src/input.css -o static/css/output.css --minify`)
- [ ] Related issue linked, if any
